Home Games Code Posts 🗗 Github 🗗 Contact

Ian Mihura

Software Engineering & Finance

Games

Mostly card games, inspired by stock trading, betting, poker and truco.

  • (05 Oct 2025) Botella showdown

    Showdown card game played with 2 or 3 players. Simple and straight-forward, tactical rumy style.

  • (30 Sep 2025) The Sum guessing

    A guessing game where players must guess the total sum of all cards in play, seeing only some of them. They bet with each other on their guess. This game is simple, but can be a bit brainy.

  • (19 Sep 2025) Tricky Poker betting

    A game played by tricks with no trump suit, inspired by the famous game Poker and the Latin American game Truco.

  • (14 Sep 2025) Royal Assassin p2p battle

    The crown is yours, and there's peace within the kingdom at last. But beyond your lands, a rival threatens your reign. Its king seeks to crush you before your power grows. This time, you're not alone, the lords that were once your enemies will stand by you in battle. With the four fiefdoms' armies and the Joker’s hand guiding the unseen war, you prepare to strike first.

  • (12 Sep 2025) Stonks! trading

    This is a betting game inspired by stock market trading. Players bet with each other on the expected next card suit and number.

    Check the code

  • (04 Sep 2025) Truco variantes

    Lista de variantes y reglas alternativas al truco que jugamos en Argentina y Uruguay.

  • (02 Sep 2025) Dilemma psychology

    A kind of trick-taking game, where the objective is to win the most points, inspired by the prisoner’s dilemma.

  • (12 Feb 2025) Free Market options

    A tactical game of speculation and volatility. Accumulate wealth by buying and selling option contracts based on the price movement of an underlying asset. Avoid bankruptcy and reach the Net Worth target to win.

Code

Code projects and articles about technical subjects.

  • (13 Dec 2025) Brain F*ck Compiler c++

    Compiler and Interpreter of the famous and esoteric programming language.

    Check the code

  • (01 Nov 2025) SBE Multicast golang

    Simple Binary Encode (SBE) parsing app that receives market data packets via multicast and prints them out to stdout.

    Check the code

  • (12 Sep 2025) Stonks! card game

    This is a betting game inspired by stock market trading. Players bet with each other on the expected next card suit and number.

    Check the code

  • (11 Aug 2025) Orderbook execution golang

    A dummy orderbook architecture. Simulates a queue of pending transactions at different prices. When a match is found between two prices, the matching engine will execute the trade.

    Check the code

  • (12 Oct 2023) LMC CLI debugger c++

    Simple CLI tool to execute and debug LMC (assembly-like) programs. Read more about LMC.

    Check the code

  • (27 Apr 2021) RetroFF ffmpeg

    Transcode video file utility for transcoding quickly and easily, using multiple instances of ffmpeg in paralel.

    Check the code

  • (04 Feb 2021) Pings python

    Ping a list of IP addresses, or a subnet. You can add aliases to the IPs to identify them easily, make lists and saved your preferences to profiles in %appdata% (originally developed for Windows environment).

    Check the code

  • (29 Jun 2020) When Math becomes Illegal encryption

    Encryption is essentially math. Math, that is, with peculiar properties that allow, among other things, to keep secrets and guarantee veracity of data. It works always and always the same, and has accompanied the growth of the Internet.
